scenario.key_phrase: Can you tell me about EMI options?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Hello! Good morning, main Priya bol rahi hun PhysicsWallah se. Am I speaking with Pallavi?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Haan, yes this is Pallavi. I had inquired about JEE courses on your website.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! Thank you for showing interest in PW. Pallavi, could you tell me which class you're currently in and when are you planning to appear for JEE?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I'm in Class 12 right now. Planning to give JEE Main this year only, so around 8 months left I think.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Great! 8 months is actually good time if you start with proper guidance. Have you been preparing on your own till now, or taking any coaching?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: I was going to local coaching but honestly it's not that effective. That's why looking for online options now. What courses do you have for someone like me?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Bilkul sahi decision! For Class 12 students targeting JEE 2027, I'd recommend our JEE Lakshya 2027 batch - it's comprehensive with live classes, doubt solving, and mock tests. The fee is ₹35,999. We also have JEE Arjuna at ₹19,999 which is more focused.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Hmm, the price seems a bit high for my family. Can you tell me about EMI options? And what's the difference between these two courses?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Of course! We offer 0% EMI through PW Pay. Lakshya EMI is just ₹3,499/month and Arjuna is ₹1,999/month - that's less than what most families spend on daily chai! Lakshya has more comprehensive coverage with extra practice sessions, while Arjuna covers all essential topics efficiently.

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: ₹1,999 per month sounds more reasonable. But I'll need to discuss this with my parents first. Can you call me back tomorrow evening?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Absolutely! That's completely understandable. Let me share the course details on WhatsApp so you can show your parents. What time would be convenient tomorrow evening?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Around 7 PM would be good. Also, do you have any trial classes or demo so I can see the teaching quality first?

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Perfect! Yes, we have free demo classes. I'll send you the link along with course details. You can attend today's Physics class at 4 PM. Shall I schedule a call for tomorrow 7 PM then?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: Yes, that works. Please send everything on WhatsApp. I'll discuss with parents and attend the demo class today.

messages.speaker: agent
messages.text: Wonderful Pallavi! I'm sending all details right now. Attend the demo, discuss with family, and I'll call you tomorrow at 7 PM. Any other questions for now?

messages.speaker: student
messages.text: No, I think that covers everything. Thank you Priya! I'll check the demo class and talk to you tomorrow.
